headline: Fertiliser subsidy to double; fisc in control: Govt sources
subheadline: Officials see no need for additional borrowing
body_head: Despite mounting pressure from surging global commodity prices that nearly double the Centre's fertiliser subsidy bill to ₹3.4 lakh crore and necessitate support for marketing and distribution, the government remains firm in control of the fiscal situation and growth momentum, senior officials said.
vision_head: Despite mounting pressure from surging global commodity prices that nearly double the Centre's fertiliser subsidy bill to ₹3.4 lakh crore and necessitate support for marketing and distribution, the government remains firm in control of the fiscal situation and growth momentum, senior officials said.

headline: Zepto emerges as challenger to Blinkit

vision_head: Zepto's market debut would make it the third major quick-commerce player with publicly disclosed financials, increasing pressure in a sector projected to grow five to seven times by 2030. The last numbers suggest Blinkit retains a sizeable lead, but Zepto has narrowed the battle on growth and scale,

headline: Asia's longest tunnel takes shape
body_head: Vehicles drive through the ₹6,800-crore Zojila Tunnel - Asia's longest connecting the Kashmir Valley to Ladakh - following its breakthrough ceremony at Minamarg in Ladakh on Tuesday. The tunnel, one of India's most challenging infra projects, is likely to be thrown open to the public in February 202
vision_head: Vehicles drive through the ₹6,800-crore Zojila Tunnel - Asia's longest connecting the Kashmir Valley to Ladakh - following its breakthrough ceremony at Minamarg in Ladakh on Tuesday. headline: Adani Energy to buy IntelliSmart for ₹3,050 cr
body_head: Adani Energy to buy IntelliSmart for z3,050 cr ADANI ENERGY sday signed a e 100%
vision_head: Adani Energy Solutions on Tuesday signed a binding agreement to acquire 100% stake in IntelliSmart Infrastructure for ₹3,050 crore, a move that will create India's largest smart metering platform, reports Saurav Anand.

headline: AI agents may equal TCS' human workforce in 3 yrs
body_head:
If the company has half a million employees, the day is not far when the company will have half a million AI agents.

The company's employees and AI agents will work together, and that will be the future.

vision_head: Kia India is preparing a two-pronged strategy to propel SUV offensive in the domestic market. The company will launch two new models in the coming 12-18 months - the Sonet facelift and the Seltos mid-life update.

headline: BYD bets on plug-in hybrids
body_head: Chinese new energy vehicle maker BYD will launch its first plug-in hybrid vehicle in India during the festive season, betting on the technology can attract buyers seeking electric cars but are concerned over charging infrastructure and vehicle range.
vision_head: Chinese new energy vehicle maker BYD will launch its first plug-in hybrid vehicle in India during the festive season, betting on the technology can attract buyers seeking electric cars but are concerned over charging infrastructure and vehicle range.

headline: New Mehti missive deepens Tata row
body_head: Former Tata Trusts trustee Natarajan Chandrasekaran has sought scrutiny of decisions received by certain trustees from Tata Group companies, potential conflicts of interest arising from board positions, governance and the decision not to renew Mistry's tenure at the Sons. Mistry has sought scrutiny
